scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.format: npx prettier --write package.json .prettierrc.json .github/workflows/ci.yml apps/frontend/package.json apps/backend/package.json packages/shared/package.json packages/shared/index.js packages/shared/index.d.ts apps/backend/src/app.controller.ts apps/backend/src/health.ts apps/frontend/test/shared.test.js apps/backend/test/health.test.js
scripts.format:check: npx prettier --check package.json .prettierrc.json .github/workflows/ci.yml apps/frontend/package.json apps/backend/package.json packages/shared/package.json packages/shared/index.js packages/shared/index.d.ts apps/backend/src/app.controller.ts apps/backend/src/health.ts apps/frontend/test/shared.test.js apps/backend/test/health.test.js
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
